mapper.sql: id, `owner`, product, cluster, creator, modifier, executor, task_id, task_name, task_description, migration_type, create_time, modify_time, execute_time, version, `status`, properties, handlers, reader_id, reader_type, reader_url, writer_url, reader_table_name, writer_id, writer_type, writer_table_name
mapper.select:
select
from task_online where id in (select MAX(id) from task_online group by task_id) and task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select count(*) from task_online where task_id = #{taskId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select
from task_online where id in (select MAX(id) from task_online group by task_id) and product = #{product, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cluster = #{cluster, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and owner = #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and writer_type = #{writerType,jdbcType=TINYINT}
and reader_type = #{readerType,jdbcType=TINYINT}
and reader_url like concat('%', #{readerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
and writer_url like concat('%', #{writerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
and writer_table_name like concat('%', #{writerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
and task_name like concat('%', #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
order by modify_time desc
order by modify_time asc
order by create_time desc
order by create_time asc
order by modify_time desc

select count(*) from task_online where id in (select MAX(id) from task_online group by task_id) and product = #{product, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cluster = #{cluster, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and task_name like concat('%', #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
select version from task_online where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select DISTINCT(reader_id) from task_online where task_id = #{taskId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select DISTINCT(writer_id) from task_online where task_id = #{taskId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into task_online (id, owner, product, cluster, creator, modifier, executor, task_id, task_name, task_description, migration_type, create_time, modify_time, execute_time, version, status, properties, handlers, reader_id, reader_type, reader_url, writer_url, reader_table_name, writer_id, writer_type, writer_table_name) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{migrationType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{executeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{properties,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, #{handlers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{readerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{readerType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{readerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{readerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{writerType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{writerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into task_online
id,
owner,
product,
cluster,
creator,
modifier,
executor,
task_id,
task_name,
task_description,
migration_type,
create_time,
modify_time,
execute_time,

status,
properties,
handlers,
reader_id,
reader_type,
reader_Url,
writer_Url,
reader_table_name,
writer_id,
writer_type,
writer_table_name,

mapper.update:
update task_online
owner = #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product = #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cluster = #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
executor = #{executor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_description = #{taskDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
migration_type = #{migrationType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
execute_time = #{executeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
properties = #{properties,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
handlers = #{handlers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reader_id = #{readerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reader_type = #{readerType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
reader_Url = #{readerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
writer_Url = #{writerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reader_table_name = #{readerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
writer_id = #{writerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
writer_type = #{writerType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
writer_table_name = #{writerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update task_online set owner = #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product = #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cluster = #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, executor = #{executor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_description = #{taskDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, migration_type = #{migrationType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, execute_time = #{executeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, properties = #{properties,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, handlers = #{handlers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reader_id = #{readerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, reader_type = #{readerType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, reader_Url = #{readerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, writer_Url = #{writerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reader_table_name = #{readerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, writer_id = #{writerId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, writer_type = #{writerType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, writer_table_name = #{writerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update task_online
version = version + 1,
owner = #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product = #{product,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cluster = #{cluster,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
executor = #{executor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_name = #{taskName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_description = #{taskDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
migration_type = #{migrationType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
execute_time = #{executeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
properties = #{properties,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
handlers = #{handlers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reader_id = #{readerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
reader_type = #{readerType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
reader_Url = #{readerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
writer_Url = #{writerUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reader_table_name = #{readerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
writer_id = #{writerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
writer_type = #{writerType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
writer_table_name = #{writerTableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
